name: Zeitz MOCAA
description: The Museum of Contemporary Art Africa, in a converted grain silo on the V&A Waterfront. It holds one of the largest collections of contemporary art from Africa and its diaspora.
formatted_address: Silo District, S Arm Rd, V&A Waterfront, Cape Town, 8001

name: Norval Foundation
description: A museum and sculpture garden in Tokai showing modern and contemporary art from Africa, with a strong public programme and a focus on under-recognised artists.

name: Stevenson
description: A leading contemporary gallery in Woodstock representing major South African and international artists, with a second space in Johannesburg.
formatted_address: Buchanan Building, 160 Sir Lowry Road, Woodstock, Cape Town, 7925

name: Goodman Gallery
description: An internationally established gallery promoting contemporary African art and socially engaged practice, with spaces in Cape Town, Johannesburg, London, and New York.
formatted_address: 37A Somerset Rd, Green Point, Cape Town, 8005

name: blank projects
description: A contemporary gallery in Woodstock founded as a project space in 2005, showing emerging and established artists from the region. Entry is free.

name: WHATIFTHEWORLD
description: A contemporary gallery now in the city centre, known for showing a generation of younger South African artists alongside established names. Entry is free.
formatted_address: 16 Buiten Street, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8000

name: Everard Read Cape Town
description: A long-established gallery on the V&A Waterfront, with its CIRCA space and a sculpture garden, showing modern and contemporary South African art.
formatted_address: 3 Portswood Rd, V&A Waterfront, Cape Town, 8002

name: SMAC Gallery
description: A contemporary gallery showing African artists, located at The Palms in Woodstock with further spaces in Stellenbosch and Johannesburg.
formatted_address: The Palms, 145 Sir Lowry Road, Woodstock, Cape Town, 7925

name: THK Gallery
description: A city-centre gallery showing contemporary visual art from Africa and the Global South, with a programme of solo and group exhibitions.
formatted_address: 52 Waterkant Street, De Waterkant, Cape Town, 8001

name: AVA Gallery
description: The Association for Visual Arts, a non-profit gallery in the city centre since 1971, giving exhibition opportunities to emerging and established South African artists. Entry is free.
formatted_address: 35 Church Street, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8001

name: Eclectica Contemporary
description: A city-centre gallery showing contemporary African art, with a programme that gives space to emerging voices.
formatted_address: 69 Burg Street, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8001

name: 99 Loop Gallery
description: A contemporary gallery on Loop Street in the city centre, showing emerging and mid-career South African artists.
formatted_address: 99 Loop Street, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8001

name: WORLDART
description: A gallery on Long Street showing contemporary South African art, including street-influenced and emerging work.
formatted_address: 68 Long Street, Cape Town City Centre, Cape Town, 8001

name: Iziko South African National Gallery
description: South Africa's national art museum, in the Company's Garden, holding historical and contemporary South African and African collections.
formatted_address: Government Ave, Company's Garden, Gardens, Cape Town, 8001
